name: Salesforce CRM
description: Salesforce CRM (35 tools): full read/write on Contacts, Accounts, Leads, Opportunities, Cases, Tasks via REST API v60.0. Plus generic SOQL query, SOSL search and describe-object. Auth via Client Credentials Flow (External Client App) — no user redirect, pure server-to-server.

credentials_required.label: Salesforce Instance URL
credentials_required.hint: Your My-Domain URL, e.g. https://your-org.my.salesforce.com or https://orgfarm-xxx-dev-ed.develop.my.salesforce.com (developer edition). NOT the Lightning URL (*.lightning.force.com). Include https:// and no trailing slash.

credentials_required.label: Consumer Key (Client ID)
credentials_required.hint: Setup -> Externe Client-Anwendungen -> New -> enable OAuth -> Scopes: 'api' -> Flow-Activation: 'Flow for Client Credentials enable' -> Save. Richtlinien tab -> Bearbeiten -> enable 'Flow for Client Credentials' + set Ausführungsbenutzer (Run-As User, your SF username). Settings tab -> OAuth Settings -> 'Consumer Key and Secret' button -> copy Consumer Key.

credentials_required.label: Consumer Secret
credentials_required.hint: Same dialog as Consumer Key ('Consumer Key and Secret' button). Requires Enterprise/Unlimited/Developer Edition — Starter/Essentials does not support API access.

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.description: List recent Contacts. Optional: limit (1-200, default 10)

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search Contacts by any field via SOQL WHERE. Params: field (default Name), operator (=, LIKE, !=), value. Example: field=Email, operator=LIKE, value=%@edge.com

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get Contact by Id (15 or 18 char)

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create Contact. LastName required. Optional: FirstName, Email, Phone, Title, AccountId, MailingCity, MailingCountry, custom_fields (JSON-string for *__c fields)

tools.name: update_contact
tools.description: Update Contact by Id. Any of: FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Title, AccountId, MailingCity, MailingCountry, custom_fields (JSON-string)

tools.name: delete_contact
tools.description: Delete Contact by Id (moves to Recycle Bin, restorable for 15 days)

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List recent Accounts (companies). Optional: limit (1-200, default 10)

tools.name: search_accounts
tools.description: Search Accounts by any field. Params: field (default Name), operator (=, LIKE), value

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get Account by Id (incl. Industry, Phone, Website, BillingCity/Country)

tools.name: create_account
tools.description: Create Account. Name required. Optional: Phone, Website, Industry, BillingCity, BillingCountry, Description, NumberOfEmployees, AnnualRevenue, custom_fields (JSON-string)

tools.name: update_account
tools.description: Update Account by Id. Any of: Name, Phone, Website, Industry, BillingCity, BillingCountry, Description, NumberOfEmployees, AnnualRevenue, custom_fields

tools.name: delete_account
tools.description: Delete Account by Id

tools.name: list_leads
tools.description: List recent Leads (unconverted by default). Optional: limit, include_converted (true|false)

tools.name: search_leads
tools.description: Search Leads by field. Params: field (default Name), operator, value. Common: Status, Company, LeadSource, Rating

tools.name: get_lead
tools.description: Get Lead by Id

tools.name: create_lead
tools.description: Create Lead. LastName + Company required. Optional: FirstName, Email, Phone, Title, Status, LeadSource, Rating, Industry, custom_fields

tools.name: update_lead
tools.description: Update Lead by Id. Any of: FirstName, LastName, Company, Email, Phone, Title, Status, LeadSource, Rating, Industry, custom_fields

tools.name: delete_lead
tools.description: Delete Lead by Id. NOTE: Lead conversion (Lead -> Account+Contact+Opportunity) is not supported via REST in all editions — use Salesforce UI 'Convert' button

tools.name: list_opportunities
tools.description: List recent Opportunities. Optional: limit, open_only (true=exclude Closed Won/Lost)

tools.name: search_opportunities
tools.description: Search Opportunities by field. Params: field (default Name), operator, value. Common: StageName, Amount, CloseDate, OwnerId

tools.name: get_opportunity
tools.description: Get Opportunity by Id (incl. Account, Amount, Stage, Probability, CloseDate)

tools.name: create_opportunity
tools.description: Create Opportunity. Name + StageName + CloseDate (YYYY-MM-DD) required. Optional: Amount, AccountId, Probability, Type, LeadSource, Description, custom_fields

tools.name: update_opportunity
tools.description: Update Opportunity by Id. Any of: Name, StageName, CloseDate, Amount, AccountId, Probability, Type, LeadSource, Description, custom_fields

tools.name: delete_opportunity
tools.description: Delete Opportunity by Id

tools.name: list_cases
tools.description: List recent Cases (Service Cloud). Optional: limit, open_only (exclude Closed)

tools.name: get_case
tools.description: Get Case by Id (incl. CaseNumber, Status, Priority, ContactId, AccountId)

tools.name: create_case
tools.description: Create Case. Subject required. Optional: Description, Status, Priority (Low/Medium/High), Origin, ContactId, AccountId, custom_fields

tools.name: update_case
tools.description: Update Case by Id. Any of: Subject, Description, Status, Priority, Origin, ContactId, AccountId, custom_fields

tools.name: delete_case
tools.description: Delete Case by Id

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List recent Tasks. Optional: limit, open_only (exclude Completed), who_id (ContactId/LeadId filter)

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create Task. Subject required. Optional: Description, Status (Not Started/In Progress/Completed), Priority (Low/Normal/High), ActivityDate (YYYY-MM-DD), WhoId (Contact/Lead), WhatId (Account/Opp/Case), OwnerId, custom_fields

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update Task by Id. Any of: Subject, Description, Status, Priority, ActivityDate, WhoId, WhatId, OwnerId, custom_fields

tools.name: soql_query
tools.description: Run a custom SOQL query. Param: query (full SOQL string, e.g. 'SELECT Id, Name, Email FROM Contact WHERE Email LIKE %@edge.com%25 LIMIT 10'). Escape % as %25 in URLs — this tool handles encoding.

tools.name: sosl_search
tools.description: Full-text search across multiple objects via SOSL. Param: query (search term) — searches Contact, Account, Lead, Opportunity, Case by default. Optional: sobjects (comma-separated override, e.g. 'Contact,Lead')

tools.name: describe_object
tools.description: Get metadata for an SObject type (fields, types, picklist values). Param: object_type (e.g. Contact, Account, Opportunity). Useful to discover custom fields (*__c) before create/update.

author: freddy-schuetz
